revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 勝占神社 |画像 = |所在地 = [[徳島県]][[徳島市]]勝占町中山26 |位置 = |祭神 = [[大国主|大己貴命]] |社格 = [[郷社|旧郷社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = [[10月9日]] |神事 = |}} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[徳島市]]勝占町にある[[神社]]である。
== 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳。[[1875年]]（[[明治]]8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、[[スサノオ|素盞嗚尊]]が祭神であったという説がある。[[元暦]]元年（[[1184年]]）[[3月10日 (旧暦)|3月10日]]に[[源義経]]が[[屋島]]へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる。
== 祭神 == * [[大国主|大己貴命]] * 配祀 - [[事代主|事代主命]]、[[スセリビメ|須勢理姫命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少名彦命]]、玉櫛姫命、[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]]
== 摂末社 == * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社
== 祭事 == * 夏季大祭 - [[7月9日]] * 秋季大祭 - [[10月9日]]
== 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]][[地蔵橋駅]]を南に約1km。
== 外部リンク == * [http://kamnavi.jp/en/sikoku/katuura.htm 勝占神社]
{{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:郷社]] {{shinto-stub}}

[[式内社]] |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= [[10月9日]] |神事= |}} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]にある[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳。[[1875年]]（[[明治]]8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、[[スサノオ|素盞嗚尊]]が祭神であったという説がある。[[元暦]]元年（[[1184年]]）[[3月10日 (旧暦)|3月10日]]に[[源義経]]が[[屋島]]へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる。 == 祭神 == * [[大国主|大己貴命]] * 配祀 - [[事代主|事代主命]]、[[スセリビメ|須勢理姫命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少名彦命]]、[[玉櫛媛|玉櫛姫命]]、[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]] == 摂末社 == * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 == 祭事 == * 夏季大祭 - [[7月9日]] * 秋季大祭 - [[10月9日]] == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]][[地蔵橋駅]]を南に約1km。 {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

{{神社 |名称= 勝占神社 |画像= [[File:勝占神社.jpg|center|270px|勝占神社の拝殿]] |所在地= [[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]中山26 |位置= {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|1|6.95|N|134|32|56.87|E|}} |祭神= [[大国主|大己貴命]] |社格= [[郷社|旧郷社]]
[[式内社]] |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= [[10月9日]] |神事= |}} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]にある[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）。[[1875年]]（[[明治]]8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、[[スサノオ|素盞嗚尊]]が祭神であったという説がある。 [[元暦]]元年（[[1184年]]）[[3月10日 (旧暦)|3月10日]]に[[源義経]]が[[屋島]]へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる[[2000年]],[[平凡社]]『徳島県の地名』。 == 祭神 == * [[大国主|大己貴命]] * 配祀 - [[事代主|事代主命]]、[[スセリビメ|須勢理姫命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少名彦命]]、[[玉櫛媛|玉櫛姫命]]、[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]] == 摂末社 == * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 == 祭事 == * 夏季大祭 - [[7月9日]] * 秋季大祭 - [[10月9日]] == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]]「[[地蔵橋駅]]」より徒歩で約15分。 * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[徳島インターチェンジ]]」より車で約20分。 == 脚注 == {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

revision.text:
{{Shrine |Name = Katsura Shrine |Image = [[File:勝占神社.jpg|center|270px|Main hall of Katsura Shrine]] |Location = [[Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima]], [[Tokushima City|Tokushima City]], Katsurachō Nakayama 26 |Coordinates = {{Coord|34|1|6.95|N|134|32|56.87|E|display=inline,title}} |Main Deity = [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] |Classification = [[Gōsha|Former Gōsha Shrine]]
[[Shikinaisha|Shikinaisha]] |Foundation = |Main Hall = |Alternate Name = |Annual Festival = [[October 9]] |Religious Rites = }} '''Katsura Shrine''' (勝占神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市}}, [[Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]], Japan. It is situated in Katsurachō Nakayama. == History == The exact year of the shrine's establishment is unknown.『[[Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten]] 36 Tokushima Prefecture』 (1986, ISBN 4040013603) Until [[1875]] (Meiji 8), the shrine was known as Sugio Daimyōjin, and it is said that {{ill|Susanoo no Mikoto|ja|素盞嗚尊}} was its main deity. It is situated in Katsurachō Nakayama. == History == The exact year of the shrine's establishment is unknown.『[[Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten]] 36 Tokushima Prefecture』 (1986, ISBN 4040013603) Until [[1875]] (Meiji 8), the shrine was known as Sugio Daimyōjin, and it is said that {{ill|Susanoo no Mikoto|ja|素盞嗚尊}} was its main deity. On March 10, [[1184]] (Genryaku 1), {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経}} is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place Names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * Additional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命}}, {{ill|Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命}}, {{ill|Tamayorihime|ja|玉櫛媛}}, and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Jizōbashi Station|ja|地蔵橋駅}}. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Last 100]] [[Category:original pages]] [[Category:Shrines in Tokushima City]] [[Category:Last 100]] [[Category:original pages]] [[Category:Former Gōsha Shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Last 100]] [[Category:original pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha of Awa Province]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:dd]] [[ja:勝占神社]]

revision.text:
{{Shrine |Name = Katsura Shrine |Image = [[File:勝占神社.jpg|center|270px|Main hall of Katsura Shrine]] |Location = [[Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima]], [[Tokushima City|Tokushima City]], Katsurachō Nakayama 26 |Coordinates = {{Coord|34|1|6.95|N|134|32|56.87|E|display=inline,title}} |Main Deity = [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] |Classification = [[Gōsha|Former Gōsha Shrine]]
[[Shikinaisha|Shikinaisha]] |Foundation = |Main Hall = |Alternate Name = |Annual Festival = [[October 9]] |Religious Rites = }} '''Katsura Shrine''' (勝占神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Tokushima City|ja|徳島市}}, [[Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]], Japan. It is situated in Katsurachō Nakayama. == History == The exact year of the shrine's establishment is unknown.『[[Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten]] 36 Tokushima Prefecture』 (1986, ISBN 4040013603) Until [[1875]] (Meiji 8), the shrine was known as Sugio Daimyōjin, and it is said that {{ill|Susanoo no Mikoto|ja|素盞嗚尊}} was its main deity. On March 10, [[1184]] (Genryaku 1), {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経}} is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place Names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * Additional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命}}, {{ill|Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命}}, {{ill|Tamayorihime|ja|玉櫛媛}}, and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Jizōbashi Station|ja|地蔵橋駅}}. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Shrines in Tokushima City]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Former Gōsha Shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Shikinaisha of Awa Province]] [[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:dd]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] [[Category:1 revision imported]] [[ja:勝占神社]]

On March 10, [[1184]] (Genryaku 1), {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経}} is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * Additional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命}}, {{ill|Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命}}, {{ill|Tamayorihime|ja|玉櫛媛}}, and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Jizōbashi Station|ja|地蔵橋駅}}. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Pages needing attribution 2]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Pages needing attribution 2]] [[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Shrines in Tokushima City]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Pages needing attribution 2]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Pages needing attribution 2]] [[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Former Gōsha Shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Pages needing attribution 2]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Pages needing attribution 2]] [[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Shikinaisha of Awa Province]] [[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:dd]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] [[Category:1 revision imported]] [[Category:refreshing so the massreplace can be done again]] [[ja:勝占神社]]

On March 10, [[1184]] (Genryaku 1), {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経}} is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * Additional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命}}, {{ill|Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命}}, {{ill|Tamayorihime|ja|玉櫛媛}}, and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Jizōbashi Station|ja|地蔵橋駅}}. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Katsuga Shrine-qq]] [[Category:Shrines in Tokushima City]] [[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Katsuga Shrine-qq]] [[Category:Former Gōsha Shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Katsuga Shrine-qq]] [[Category:Shikinaisha of Awa Province]] [[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:dd]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] [[Category:1 revision imported]] [[Category:refreshing so the massreplace can be done again]] [[Category:kk]] [[ja:勝占神社]]

[[July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Jizōbashi Station|ja|地蔵橋駅}}. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Shrines in Tokushima City]] [[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Former Gōsha Shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Shikinaisha of Awa Province]] [[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:dd]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] [[Category:1 revision imported]] [[Category:refreshing so the massreplace can be done again]] [[Category:kk]] [[sn:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:勝占神社]] [[Category:ppp]]

[[Shikinaisha|Shikinaisha]] |Foundation = |Main Hall = |Alternate name = |festival = [[October 9]] |Religious Rites = }} '''Katsura Shrine''' (勝占神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Tokushima (city)|ja|徳島市}}, [[Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]], Japan. It is situated in Katsurachō Nakayama. == History == The exact year of the shrine's establishment is unknown.『[[Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten]] 36 Tokushima Prefecture』 (1986, ISBN 4040013603) Until [[1875]] (Meiji 8), the shrine was known as Sugio Daimyōjin, and it is said that {{ill|Susanoo no Mikoto|ja|素盞嗚尊}} was its main deity. On March 10, [[1184]] (Genryaku 1), {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経}} is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * Aqqitional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命}}, {{ill|Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命}}, {{ill|Tamayorihime|ja|玉櫛媛}}, and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Jizōbashi Station|ja|地蔵橋駅}}. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Katsuga Shrine]][[Category:qq]] On March 10, [[1184]] (Genryaku 1), {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経}} is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place names" == {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Katsura Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:勝占神社.jpg|center|270px|Main hall of Katsura Shrine]] |location = [[Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima]], [[Tokushima (city)|Tokushima City]], Katsurachō Nakayama 26 |coordinates = {{Coord|34|1|6.95|N|134|32|56.87|E|display=inline,title}} |Main deity = [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] |Classification = [[Gōsha|Former Gōsha Shrine]]
[[Shikinaisha|Shikinaisha]] |Foundation = |Main Hall = |Alternate name = |festival = [[October 9]] |Religious Rites = }} '''Katsura Shrine''' (勝占神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Tokushima (city)|ja|徳島市}}, [[Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]], Japan. It is situated in Katsurachō Nakayama. == History == The exact year of the shrine's establishment is unknown.『[[Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten]] 36 Tokushima Prefecture』 (1986, ISBN 4040013603) Until [[1875]] (Meiji 8), the shrine was known as Sugio Daimyōjin, and it is said that {{ill|Susanoo no Mikoto|ja|素盞嗚尊}} was its main deity. On March 10, [[1184]] (Genryaku 1), {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経}} is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * A11itional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命}}, {{ill|Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命}}, {{ill|Tamayorihime|ja|玉櫛媛}}, and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Jizōbashi Station|ja|地蔵橋駅}}. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Katsura Shrine]][[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Katsura Shrine]][[Category:11]] {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Katsura Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:勝占神社.jpg|center|270px|Main hall of Katsura Shrine]] |location = [[Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima]], [[Tokushima (city)|Tokushima City]], Katsurachō Nakayama 26 |coordinates = {{Coord|34|1|6.95|N|134|32|56.87|E|display=inline,title}} |Main deity = [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] |Classification = [[Gōsha|Former Gōsha Shrine]]
[[Shikinaisha|Shikinaisha]] |Foundation = |Main Hall = |Alternate name = |festival = [[October 9]] |Religious Rites = }} '''Katsura Shrine''' (勝占神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Tokushima (city)|ja|徳島市}}, [[Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]], Japan. It is situated in Katsurachō Nakayama. == History == The exact year of the shrine's establishment is unknown.『[[Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten]] 36 Tokushima Prefecture』 (1986, ISBN 4040013603) Until [[1875]] (Meiji 8), the shrine was known as Sugio Daimyōjin, and it is said that {{ill|Susanoo no Mikoto|ja|素盞嗚尊}} was its main deity. On March 10, [[1184]] (Genryaku 1), {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経}} is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * A11itional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命}}, {{ill|Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命}}, {{ill|Tamayorihime|ja|玉櫛媛}}, and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命|1=Ōyamatsumi}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Jizōbashi Station|ja|地蔵橋駅}}. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Katsura Shrine]][[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Katsura Shrine]][[Category:qq]] {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Katsura Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:勝占神社.jpg|center|270px|Main hall of Katsura Shrine]] |location = [[Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima]], [[Tokushima (city)|Tokushima City]], Katsurachō Nakayama 26 |coordinates = {{Coord|34|1|6.95|N|134|32|56.87|E|display=inline,title}} |Main deity = [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] |Classification = [[Gōsha|Former Gōsha Shrine]]
[[Shikinaisha|Shikinaisha]] |Foundation = |Main Hall = |Alternate name = |festival = [[October 9]] |Religious Rites = }} '''Katsura Shrine''' (勝占神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Tokushima (city)|ja|徳島市}}, [[Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]], Japan. It is situated in Katsurachō Nakayama. == History == The exact year of the shrine's establishment is unknown.『[[Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten]] 36 Tokushima Prefecture』 (1986, ISBN 4040013603) Until [[1875]] (Meiji 8), the shrine was known as Sugio Daimyōjin, and it is said that {{ill|Susanoo no Mikoto|ja|素盞嗚尊}} was its main deity. On March 10, [[dd84]] (Genryaku 1), {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経}} is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * A[[Category:dd to dd]]dditional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命}}, {{ill|Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命}}, {{ill|Tamayorihime|ja|玉櫛媛}}, and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命|1=Ōyamatsumi}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Jizōbashi Station|ja|地蔵橋駅}}. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Katsura Shrine]][[Category:Completion tier 2]][[Category: tier 2]] {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Katsura Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:勝占神社.jpg|center|270px|Main hall of Katsura Shrine]] |location = [[Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima]], [[Tokushima (city)|Tokushima City]], Katsurachō Nakayama 26 |coordinates = {{Coord|34|1|6.95|N|134|32|56.87|E|display=inline,title}} |Main deity = [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] |Classification = [[Gōsha|Former Gōsha Shrine]]
[[Shikinaisha|Shikinaisha]] |Foundation = |Main Hall = |Alternate name = |festival = [[October 9]] |Religious Rites = }} '''Katsura Shrine''' (勝占神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Tokushima (city)|ja|徳島市}}, [[Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]], Japan. It is situated in Katsurachō Nakayama. == History == The exact year of the shrine's establishment is unknown.『[[Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten]] 36 Tokushima Prefecture』 (1986, ISBN 4040013603) Until [[1875]] (Meiji 8), the shrine was known as Sugio Daimyōjin, and it is said that {{ill|Susanoo no Mikoto|ja|素盞嗚尊}} was its main deity. On March 10, [[dd84]] (Genryaku 1), {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経}} is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * Additional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命}}, {{ill|Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命}}, {{ill|Tamayorihime|ja|玉櫛媛}}, and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命|1=Ōyamatsumi}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Jizōbashi Station|ja|地蔵橋駅}}. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} {{draft categories| [[Category:dd to dd]] [[Category:Katsura Shrine]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:Shrines in Tokushima City]] [[Category:Former Gōsha Shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha of Awa Province]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:Katsura Shrine]] [[ja:勝占神社]] [[en:Katsura Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Katsura Shrine}}

revision.comment: 10 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:勝占神社 up to rev 101221007
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 勝占神社 |画像= [[File:勝占神社.jpg|center|270px|勝占神社の拝殿]] |所在地= [[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]中山26 |位置= {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|1|6.95|N|134|32|56.87|E|}} |祭神= [[大国主|大己貴命]] |社格= [[郷社|旧郷社]]
[[式内社]] |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= [[10月9日]] |神事= |}} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]にある[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）。[[1875年]]（[[明治]]8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、[[スサノオ|素盞嗚尊]]が祭神であったという説がある。 [[元暦]]元年（[[1184年]]）[[3月10日 (旧暦)|3月10日]]に[[源義経]]が[[屋島]]へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる[[2000年]],[[平凡社]]『徳島県の地名』。 == 祭神 == * [[大国主|大己貴命]] * 配祀 - [[事代主|事代主命]]、[[スセリビメ|須勢理姫命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少名彦命]]、[[玉櫛媛|玉櫛姫命]]、[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]] == 摂末社 == * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 == 祭事 == * 夏季大祭 - [[7月9日]] * 秋季大祭 - [[10月9日]] == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]]「[[地蔵橋駅]]」より徒歩で約15分。 * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[徳島インターチェンジ]]」より車で約20分。 == 脚注 == {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

[[Shikinaisha|Shikinaisha]] |Foundation = |Main Hall = |Alternate name = |festival = [[October 9]] |Religious Rites = }} '''Katsura Shrine''' (勝占神社) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Tokushima (city)|ja|徳島市|12=draft}}, [[Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]], Japan. On March 10, [[dd84]] (Genryaku 1), {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|12=draft}} is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島|12=draft}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * Additional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tamayorihime|ja|玉櫛媛|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命|1=Ōyamatsumi|12=draft}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Jizōbashi Station|ja|地蔵橋駅|12=draft}}. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| }} {{translated page|ja|勝占神社|version=101221007|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shrines in Tokushima City]] [[Category:Former Gōsha Shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha of Awa Province]] }} [[sn:Katsura Shrine]] [[ja:勝占神社]] [[en:Katsura Shrine]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Katsura Shrine}}

On March 10, [[dd84]] (Genryaku 1), {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|ja|源義経|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * Additional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Tamayorihime|ja|玉櫛媛|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命|1=Ōyamatsumi|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Jizōbashi Station|ja|地蔵橋駅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|勝占神社|version=101221007|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shrines in Tokushima City]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha Shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] }} [[sn:Katsura Shrine]] [[ja:勝占神社]] [[en:Katsura Shrine]]

On March 10, [[1184]] (Genryaku 1), [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashima|qq=}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * Additional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|qq=}}, {{ill|Suseri-Hime|lt=Suseri-Hime|lt=Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suseribime|qq=}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|qq=}}, [[:en:Tamakushi-hime|Tamayorihime]], and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命|1=Ōyamatsumi|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamakui no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s [[:en:Jizōbashi Station|Jizōbashi Station]]. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|勝占神社|version=101221007|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shrines in Tokushima City]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] }} [[sn:Katsura Shrine]] [[ja:勝占神社]] [[en:Katsura Shrine]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]]

On March 10, [[:en:1184|1184]] (Genryaku 1), [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashima|qq=}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * Additional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 事代主}}, {{ill|Suseri-Hime|lt=Suseri-Hime|lt=Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suseribime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スセリビメ}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スクナビコナ}}, [[:en:Tamakushi-hime|Tamayorihime]], and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命|1=Ōyamatsumi|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamakui no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s [[:en:Jizōbashi Station|Jizōbashi Station]]. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|勝占神社|version=101221007|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] }} [[sn:Katsura Shrine]] [[ja:勝占神社]] [[Category:Shrines in Tokushima, Tokushima]]

It is situated in Katsurachō Nakayama. == History == The exact year of the shrine's establishment is unknown.『[[Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten]] 36 Tokushima Prefecture』 (1986, ISBN 4040013603) Until [[:en:1875|1875]] (Meiji 8), the shrine was known as Sugio Daimyōjin, and it is said that {{ill|Susanoo no Mikoto|ja|素盞嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ|1=Susanoo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q272993}} was its main deity. On March 10, [[:en:1184|1184]] (Genryaku 1), [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashima|qq=|1=Yashima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11465681}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * Additional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 事代主|1=Kotoshironushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8009611}}, {{ill|Suseri-Hime|lt=Suseri-Hime|lt=Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suseribime|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スセリビメ}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スクナビコナ}}, [[:en:Tamakushi-hime|Tamayorihime]], and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命|1=Ōyamatsumi|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamakui no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[:en:July 9|July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[:en:October 9|October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s [[:en:Jizōbashi Station|Jizōbashi Station]]. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[:en:Tokushima Expressway|Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|勝占神社|version=101221007|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] }} [[sn:Katsura Shrine]] [[ja:勝占神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima, Tokushima]] [[Category:qq]]

revision.text:
[[ja:勝占神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11400187]] Wikidata name: Katsura-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:26, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11400187]] Wikidata name: Katsura-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Katsura Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:勝占神社.jpg |location = [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima]], [[:en:Tokushima (city)|Tokushima City]], Katsurachō Nakayama 26 |coordinates = {{Coord|34.018597|N|134.549131|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Main deity = [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] |Classification = [[Gōsha|Former Gō-sha Shrine]]
[[Shikinaisha|Shikinaisha]] |Foundation = |Main Hall = |Alternate name = |festival = [[:en:October 9|October 9]] |Religious Rites = |location = {{ill|Tokushima|WD=Q207309}} |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}} }} '''Katsura Shrine''' (勝占神社) is a Shinto shrine located in [[:en:Tokushima (city)|Tokushima (city)]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]], Japan. It is situated in Katsurachō Nakayama. == History == The exact year of the shrine's establishment is unknown.『[[Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten]] 36 Tokushima Prefecture』 (1986, ISBN 4040013603) Until [[:en:1875|1875]] (Meiji 8), the shrine was known as Sugio Daimyōjin, and it is said that {{ill|Susanoo no Mikoto|ja|素盞嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ|1=Susanoo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q272993}} was its main deity. On March 10, [[:en:1184|1184]] (Genryaku 1), [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashima|1=Yashima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11465681}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * Additional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 事代主|1=Kotoshironushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8009611}}, {{ill|Suseri-Hime|lt=Suseri-Hime|lt=Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suseribime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スセリビメ}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スクナビコナ}}, [[:en:Tamakushi-hime|Tamayorihime]], and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命|1=Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamakui no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[:en:July 9|July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[:en:October 9|October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s [[:en:Jizōbashi Station|Jizōbashi Station]]. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[:en:Tokushima Expressway|Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|勝占神社|version=101221007|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] }} [[ja:勝占神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima, Tokushima]] {{wikidata link|Q11400187}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

On March 10, [[:en:1184|1184]] (Genryaku 1), [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] is said to have visited the shrine on his way to {{ill|Yashima|ja|屋島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yashima|1=Yashima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11465681}}.2000, Heibonsha, "Tokushima Prefecture Place names" == Deities Enshrined == * Main deity: [[Ōkuninushi|Ōnamuchi no Mikoto]] * Additional deities: {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja|事代主命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 事代主|1=Kotoshironushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8009611}}, {{ill|Suseri-Hime|lt=Suseri-Hime|lt=Suseribime|ja|須勢理姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suseribime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スセリビメ}}, {{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少名彦命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スクナビコナ}}, [[:en:Tamakushi-hime|Tamayorihime]], and {{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山祇命|1=Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamakui no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}} == Subordinate Shrines == * Konpira-gū * Fukuribunomiya * Akiba Shrine * Jichin Shrine == Festivals == * Summer Festival - [[:en:July 9|July 9]] * Autumn Festival - [[:en:October 9|October 9]] == Access == * About a 15-minute walk from [[JR Mugi Line]]'s [[:en:Jizōbashi Station|Jizōbashi Station]]. * Approximately 20 minutes by car from the [[Tokushima Interchange]] on the [[:en:Tokushima Expressway|Tokushima Expressway]]. == References == {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|勝占神社|version=101221007|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] }} [[ja:勝占神社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima, Tokushima]] {{wikidata link|Q11400187}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

{{神社 |名称= 勝占神社 |画像= [[File:勝占神社.jpg|center|270px|勝占神社の拝殿]] |所在地= [[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]中山26 |位置= {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|1|6.95|N|134|32|56.87|E|}} |祭神= [[大国主|大己貴命]] |社格= [[郷社|旧郷社]]
[[式内社]] |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= [[10月9日]] |神事= |}} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]にある[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）。[[1875年]]（[[明治]]8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、[[スサノオ|素盞嗚尊]]が祭神であったという説がある。 [[元暦]]元年（[[1184年]]）[[3月10日 (旧暦)|3月10日]]に[[源義経]]が[[屋島]]へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる[[2000年]],[[平凡社]]『徳島県の地名』。 == 祭神 == * [[大国主|大己貴命]] * 配祀 - [[事代主|事代主命]]、[[スセリビメ|須勢理姫命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少名彦命]]、[[玉櫛媛|玉櫛姫命]]、[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]] == 摂末社 == * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 == 祭事 == * 夏季大祭 - [[7月9日]] * 秋季大祭 - [[10月9日]] == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]]「[[地蔵橋駅]]」より徒歩で約15分。 * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[徳島インターチェンジ]]」より車で約20分。 == 脚注 == {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

{{神社 |名称= 勝占神社 |画像= [[File:勝占神社.jpg|center|270px|勝占神社の拝殿]] |所在地= [[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]中山26 |位置= {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|1|6.95|N|134|32|56.87|E|}} |祭神= [[大国主|大己貴命]] |社格= [[郷社|旧郷社]]

revision.text:

Shrine DB |- | {{ill|Katsuura District, Tokushima|en|Katsuura District, Tokushima|ja|勝浦郡|es|Distrito de Katsuura|fr|District de Katsuura|id|Distrik Katsuura, Tokushima|it|Distretto di Katsuura|ko|가쓰우라군|no|Katsuura|pl|Powiat Katsuura|uk|Повіт Кацуура|zh|勝浦郡|lt=Katsuura district|WD=Q1119478}} || {{ill|Katsura Shrine|lt=Katsura Shrine|ja|勝占神社|WD=Q11400187}} || {{ill|Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|WD=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized}}[[Category:Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)]] || {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} || — || — || {{coord|34.018626|134.549227|display=inline}} || [https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183206 DB] |} {{wikidata link|Q11400187}} [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Accidentally overwritten pages]] [[Category:Pages likely having an accidental overwite in their history that shrank them]] [[Category:Accidentally overwritten pages]] [[Category:Pages likely having an accidental overwite in their history that shrank them]] [[sn:2]] [[Category:Accidentally overwritten pages]] [[Category:Pages likely having an accidental overwite in their history that shrank them]] [[sn:3]] [[Category:Accidentally overwritten pages]] [[Category:Pages likely having an accidental overwite in their history that shrank them]] [[sn:4]] == Accidentally Overwritten Content == {{神社 |名称= 勝占神社 |画像= [[File:勝占神社.jpg|center|270px|勝占神社の拝殿]] |所在地= [[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]中山26 |位置= {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|1|6.95|N|134|32|56.87|E|}} |祭神= [[大国主|大己貴命]] |社格= [[郷社|旧郷社]]
[[式内社]] |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= [[10月9日]] |神事= |}} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]にある[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）。[[1875年]]（[[明治]]8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、[[スサノオ|素盞嗚尊]]が祭神であったという説がある。 [[元暦]]元年（[[1184年]]）[[3月10日 (旧暦)|3月10日]]に[[源義経]]が[[屋島]]へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる[[2000年]],[[平凡社]]『徳島県の地名』。 == 祭神 == * [[大国主|大己貴命]] * 配祀 - [[事代主|事代主命]]、[[スセリビメ|須勢理姫命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少名彦命]]、[[玉櫛媛|玉櫛姫命]]、[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]] == 摂末社 == * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 == 祭事 == * 夏季大祭 - [[7月9日]] * 秋季大祭 - [[10月9日]] == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]]「[[地蔵橋駅]]」より徒歩で約15分。 * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[徳島インターチェンジ]]」より車で約20分。 == 脚注 == {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages that were shrank]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

[[式内社]] |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= [[10月9日]] |神事= |}} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]にある[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）。[[1875年]]（[[明治]]8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、[[スサノオ|素盞嗚尊]]が祭神であったという説がある。 [[元暦]]元年（[[1184年]]）[[3月10日 (旧暦)|3月10日]]に[[源義経]]が[[屋島]]へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる[[2000年]],[[平凡社]]『徳島県の地名』。 == 祭神 == * [[大国主|大己貴命]] * 配祀 - [[事代主|事代主命]]、[[スセリビメ|須勢理姫命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少名彦命]]、[[玉櫛媛|玉櫛姫命]]、[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]] == 摂末社 == * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 == 祭事 == * 夏季大祭 - [[7月9日]] * 秋季大祭 - [[10月9日]] == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]]「[[地蔵橋駅]]」より徒歩で約15分。 * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[徳島インターチェンジ]]」より車で約20分。 == 脚注 == {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages that were shrank]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

[[式内社]] |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= [[10月9日]] |神事= |}} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]にある[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）。[[1875年]]（[[明治]]8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、[[スサノオ|素盞嗚尊]]が祭神であったという説がある。 [[元暦]]元年（[[1184年]]）[[3月10日 (旧暦)|3月10日]]に[[源義経]]が[[屋島]]へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる[[2000年]],[[平凡社]]『徳島県の地名』。 == 祭神 == * [[大国主|大己貴命]] * 配祀 - [[事代主|事代主命]]、[[スセリビメ|須勢理姫命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少名彦命]]、[[玉櫛媛|玉櫛姫命]]、[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]] == 摂末社 == * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 == 祭事 == * 夏季大祭 - [[7月9日]] * 秋季大祭 - [[10月9日]] == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]]「[[地蔵橋駅]]」より徒歩で約15分。 * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[徳島インターチェンジ]]」より車で約20分。 == 脚注 == {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages that were shrank]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] == Accidentally Overwritten Content == [[Category:Pages with merged translations]][[Category:Pages with recovered content]] [[Category:Pages with merged translations]] {{神社 |名称= 勝占神社 |画像= [[File:勝占神社.jpg|center|270px|勝占神社の拝殿]] |所在地= [[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]中山26 |位置= {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|1|6.95|N|134|32|56.87|E|}} |祭神= [[大国主|大己貴命]] |社格= [[郷社|旧郷社]]

[[式内社]] |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= [[10月9日]] |神事= |}} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]にある[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）。[[1875年]]（[[明治]]8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、[[スサノオ|素盞嗚尊]]が祭神であったという説がある。 [[元暦]]元年（[[1184年]]）[[3月10日 (旧暦)|3月10日]]に[[源義経]]が[[屋島]]へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる[[2000年]],[[平凡社]]『徳島県の地名』。 == 祭神 == * [[大国主|大己貴命]] * 配祀 - [[事代主|事代主命]]、[[スセリビメ|須勢理姫命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少名彦命]]、[[玉櫛媛|玉櫛姫命]]、[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]] == 摂末社 == * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 == 祭事 == * 夏季大祭 - [[7月9日]] * 秋季大祭 - [[10月9日]] == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]]「[[地蔵橋駅]]」より徒歩で約15分。 * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[徳島インターチェンジ]]」より車で約20分。 == 脚注 == {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages that were shrank]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] == Accidentally Overwritten Content == [[Category:Pages with merged translations]][[Category:Pages with recovered content]] [[Category:Pages with merged translations]] {{神社 |名称= 勝占神社 |画像= [[File:勝占神社.jpg|center|270px|勝占神社の拝殿]] |所在地= [[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]中山26 |位置= {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|1|6.95|N|134|32|56.87|E|}} |祭神= [[大国主|大己貴命]] |社格= [[郷社|旧郷社]]

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{神社 |名称= 勝占神社 |画像= [[File:勝占神社.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地= [[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]中山26 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[大国主|大己貴命]] |社格= 旧[[郷社]]
[[式内社]] |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= [[10月9日]] |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=勝占神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]にある[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）。[[1875年]]（[[明治]]8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、[[スサノオ|素盞嗚尊]]が祭神であったという説がある。 [[元暦]]元年（[[1184年]]）[[3月10日 (旧暦)|3月10日]]に[[源義経]]が[[屋島]]へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる[[2000年]],[[平凡社]]『徳島県の地名』。 == 祭神 == * [[大国主|大己貴命]] * 配祀 - [[事代主|事代主命]]、[[スセリビメ|須勢理姫命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少名彦命]]、[[玉櫛媛|玉櫛姫命]]、[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]] == 摂末社 == * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 == 祭事 == * 夏季大祭 - [[7月9日]] * 秋季大祭 - [[10月9日]] == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]]「[[地蔵橋駅]]」より徒歩で約15分。 * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[徳島インターチェンジ]]」より車で約20分。 == 脚注 == {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称= 勝占神社 |画像= [[File:勝占神社.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地= [[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]中山26 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[大国主|大己貴命]] |社格= 旧[[郷社]]
[[式内社]] |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= [[10月9日]] |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=勝占神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]にある[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）。[[1875年]]（[[明治]]8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、[[スサノオ|素盞嗚尊]]が祭神であったという説がある。 [[元暦]]元年（[[1184年]]）[[3月10日 (旧暦)|3月10日]]に[[源義経]]が[[屋島]]へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる[[2000年]],[[平凡社]]『徳島県の地名』。 == 祭神 == * [[大国主|大己貴命]] * 配祀 - [[事代主|事代主命]]、[[スセリビメ|須勢理姫命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少名彦命]]、[[玉櫛媛|玉櫛姫命]]、[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]] == 摂末社 == * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 == 祭事 == * 夏季大祭 - [[7月9日]] * 秋季大祭 - [[10月9日]] == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]]「[[地蔵橋駅]]」より徒歩で約15分。 * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[徳島インターチェンジ]]」より車で約20分。 == 脚注 == {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] ==End Japanese==

Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称= 勝占神社 |画像= [[File:勝占神社.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地= [[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]中山26 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[大国主|大己貴命]] |社格= 旧[[郷社]]
[[式内社]] |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= [[10月9日]] |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=勝占神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[勝占町]]にある[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）。[[1875年]]（[[明治]]8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、[[スサノオ|素盞嗚尊]]が祭神であったという説がある。 [[元暦]]元年（[[1184年]]）[[3月10日 (旧暦)|3月10日]]に[[源義経]]が[[屋島]]へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる[[2000年]],[[平凡社]]『徳島県の地名』。 == 祭神 == * [[大国主|大己貴命]] * 配祀 - [[事代主|事代主命]]、[[スセリビメ|須勢理姫命]]、[[スクナビコナ|少名彦命]]、[[玉櫛媛|玉櫛姫命]]、[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇命]] == 摂末社 == * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 == 祭事 == * 夏季大祭 - [[7月9日]] * 秋季大祭 - [[10月9日]] == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]]「[[地蔵橋駅]]」より徒歩で約15分。 * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[徳島インターチェンジ]]」より車で約20分。 == 脚注 == {{shinto-stub}} [[category:徳島市の神社]] ==End Japanese== [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

link|Q11400187}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|勝占神社|version=107353847|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称= 勝占神社 |画像= [[File:勝占神社.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地= {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}{{jalink|勝占町|Q11400186}}中山26 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|大国主|Q276944|大己貴命}} |社格= 旧{{jalink|郷社}}
{{jalink|式内社}} |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=勝占神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}{{jalink|勝占町|Q11400186}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 == 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603）。{{jalink|1875年|Q7764}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、{{jalink|スサノオ|Q272993|素盞嗚尊}}が祭神であったという説がある。 {{jalink|元暦|Q1194250}}元年（{{jalink|1184年|Q19728}}）{{jalink|3月10日 (旧暦)|Q839021|3月10日}}に{{jalink|源義経|Q310445}}が{{jalink|屋島|Q11465681}}へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる{{jalink|2000年|Q1985}},{{jalink|平凡社|Q11482108}}『徳島県の地名』。 == 祭神 == * {{jalink|大国主|Q276944|大己貴命}} * 配祀 - {{jalink|事代主|Q8009611|事代主命}}、{{jalink|スセリビメ|Q8191715|須勢理姫命}}、{{jalink|スクナビコナ|Q3275687|少名彦命}}、{{jalink|玉櫛媛|Q11572681|玉櫛姫命}}、{{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山祇命}} == 摂末社 == * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 == 祭事 == * 夏季大祭 - {{jalink|7月9日|Q2690}} * 秋季大祭 - {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} == 交通 == * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|牟岐線|Q860478}}「{{jalink|地蔵橋駅|Q6203576}}」より徒歩で約15分。 * {{jalink|徳島自動車道|Q11490216}}「{{jalink|徳島インターチェンジ|Q11071632}}」より車で約20分。 == 脚注 == {{shinto-stub}} [[category:徳島市の神社]] ==End Japanese== [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

{{nihongo|'''Katsura Shrine'''|勝占神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{jalink|式内社}} |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=勝占神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}{{jalink|勝占町|Q11400186}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 歴史 === 創祀年代は不詳『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603）。{{jalink|1875年|Q7764}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、{{jalink|スサノオ|Q272993|素盞嗚尊}}が祭神であったという説がある。 {{jalink|元暦|Q1194250}}元年（{{jalink|1184年|Q19728}}）{{jalink|3月10日 (旧暦)|Q839021|3月10日}}に{{jalink|源義経|Q310445}}が{{jalink|屋島|Q11465681}}へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる{{jalink|2000年|Q1985}},{{jalink|平凡社|Q11482108}}『徳島県の地名』。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|大国主|Q276944|大己貴命}} * 配祀 - {{jalink|事代主|Q8009611|事代主命}}、{{jalink|スセリビメ|Q8191715|須勢理姫命}}、{{jalink|スクナビコナ|Q3275687|少名彦命}}、{{jalink|玉櫛媛|Q11572681|玉櫛姫命}}、{{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山祇命}} === 摂末社 === * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 === 祭事 === * 夏季大祭 - {{jalink|7月9日|Q2690}} * 秋季大祭 - {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} === 交通 === * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|牟岐線|Q860478}}「{{jalink|地蔵橋駅|Q6203576}}」より徒歩で約15分。 * {{jalink|徳島自動車道|Q11490216}}「{{jalink|徳島インターチェンジ|Q11071632}}」より車で約20分。 === 脚注 === {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

{{jalink|式内社}} |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=勝占神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}{{jalink|勝占町|Q11400186}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 歴史 === 創祀年代は不詳『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603）。{{jalink|1875年|Q7764}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、{{jalink|スサノオ|Q272993|素盞嗚尊}}が祭神であったという説がある。 {{jalink|元暦|Q1194250}}元年（{{jalink|1184年|Q19728}}）{{jalink|3月10日 (旧暦)|Q839021|3月10日}}に{{jalink|源義経|Q310445}}が{{jalink|屋島|Q11465681}}へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる{{jalink|2000年|Q1985}},{{jalink|平凡社|Q11482108}}『徳島県の地名』。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|大国主|Q276944|大己貴命}} * 配祀 - {{jalink|事代主|Q8009611|事代主命}}、{{jalink|スセリビメ|Q8191715|須勢理姫命}}、{{jalink|スクナビコナ|Q3275687|少名彦命}}、{{jalink|玉櫛媛|Q11572681|玉櫛姫命}}、{{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山祇命}} === 摂末社 === * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 === 祭事 === * 夏季大祭 - {{jalink|7月9日|Q2690}} * 秋季大祭 - {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} === 交通 === * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|牟岐線|Q860478}}「{{jalink|地蔵橋駅|Q6203576}}」より徒歩で約15分。 * {{jalink|徳島自動車道|Q11490216}}「{{jalink|徳島インターチェンジ|Q11071632}}」より車で約20分。 === 脚注 === {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]]

{{jalink|式内社}} |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=勝占神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}{{jalink|勝占町|Q11400186}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 歴史 === 創祀年代は不詳『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603）。{{jalink|1875年|Q7764}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、{{jalink|スサノオ|Q272993|素盞嗚尊}}が祭神であったという説がある。 {{jalink|元暦|Q1194250}}元年（{{jalink|1184年|Q19728}}）{{jalink|3月10日 (旧暦)|Q839021|3月10日}}に{{jalink|源義経|Q310445}}が{{jalink|屋島|Q11465681}}へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる{{jalink|2000年|Q1985}},{{jalink|平凡社|Q11482108}}『徳島県の地名』。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|大国主|Q276944|大己貴命}} * 配祀 - {{jalink|事代主|Q8009611|事代主命}}、{{jalink|スセリビメ|Q8191715|須勢理姫命}}、{{jalink|スクナビコナ|Q3275687|少名彦命}}、{{jalink|玉櫛媛|Q11572681|玉櫛姫命}}、{{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山祇命}} === 摂末社 === * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 === 祭事 === * 夏季大祭 - {{jalink|7月9日|Q2690}} * 秋季大祭 - {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} === 交通 === * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|牟岐線|Q860478}}「{{jalink|地蔵橋駅|Q6203576}}」より徒歩で約15分。 * {{jalink|徳島自動車道|Q11490216}}「{{jalink|徳島インターチェンジ|Q11071632}}」より車で約20分。 === 脚注 === {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{jalink|式内社}} |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=勝占神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}{{jalink|勝占町|Q11400186}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 歴史 === 創祀年代は不詳『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603）。{{jalink|1875年|Q7764}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、{{jalink|スサノオ|Q272993|素盞嗚尊}}が祭神であったという説がある。 {{jalink|元暦|Q1194250}}元年（{{jalink|1184年|Q19728}}）{{jalink|3月10日 (旧暦)|Q839021|3月10日}}に{{jalink|源義経|Q310445}}が{{jalink|屋島|Q11465681}}へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる{{jalink|2000年|Q1985}},{{jalink|平凡社|Q11482108}}『徳島県の地名』。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|大国主|Q276944|大己貴命}} * 配祀 - {{jalink|事代主|Q8009611|事代主命}}、{{jalink|スセリビメ|Q8191715|須勢理姫命}}、{{jalink|スクナビコナ|Q3275687|少名彦命}}、{{jalink|玉櫛媛|Q11572681|玉櫛姫命}}、{{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山祇命}} === 摂末社 === * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 === 祭事 === * 夏季大祭 - {{jalink|7月9日|Q2690}} * 秋季大祭 - {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} === 交通 === * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|牟岐線|Q860478}}「{{jalink|地蔵橋駅|Q6203576}}」より徒歩で約15分。 * {{jalink|徳島自動車道|Q11490216}}「{{jalink|徳島インターチェンジ|Q11071632}}」より車で約20分。 === 脚注 === {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{jalink|式内社}} |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=勝占神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}{{jalink|勝占町|Q11400186}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 歴史 === 創祀年代は不詳『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603）。{{jalink|1875年|Q7764}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、{{jalink|スサノオ|Q272993|素盞嗚尊}}が祭神であったという説がある。 {{jalink|元暦|Q1194250}}元年（{{jalink|1184年|Q19728}}）{{jalink|3月10日 (旧暦)|Q839021|3月10日}}に{{jalink|源義経|Q310445}}が{{jalink|屋島|Q11465681}}へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる{{jalink|2000年|Q1985}},{{jalink|平凡社|Q11482108}}『徳島県の地名』。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|大国主|Q276944|大己貴命}} * 配祀 - {{jalink|事代主|Q8009611|事代主命}}、{{jalink|スセリビメ|Q8191715|須勢理姫命}}、{{jalink|スクナビコナ|Q3275687|少名彦命}}、{{jalink|玉櫛媛|Q11572681|玉櫛姫命}}、{{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山祇命}} === 摂末社 === * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 === 祭事 === * 夏季大祭 - {{jalink|7月9日|Q2690}} * 秋季大祭 - {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} === 交通 === * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|牟岐線|Q860478}}「{{jalink|地蔵橋駅|Q6203576}}」より徒歩で約15分。 * {{jalink|徳島自動車道|Q11490216}}「{{jalink|徳島インターチェンジ|Q11071632}}」より車で約20分。 === 脚注 === {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{jalink|式内社}} |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=勝占神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}{{jalink|勝占町|Q11400186}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 歴史 === 創祀年代は不詳『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603）。{{jalink|1875年|Q7764}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、{{jalink|スサノオ|Q272993|素盞嗚尊}}が祭神であったという説がある。 {{jalink|元暦|Q1194250}}元年（{{jalink|1184年|Q19728}}）{{jalink|3月10日 (旧暦)|Q839021|3月10日}}に{{jalink|源義経|Q310445}}が{{jalink|屋島|Q11465681}}へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる{{jalink|2000年|Q1985}},{{jalink|平凡社|Q11482108}}『徳島県の地名』。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|大国主|Q276944|大己貴命}} * 配祀 - {{jalink|事代主|Q8009611|事代主命}}、{{jalink|スセリビメ|Q8191715|須勢理姫命}}、{{jalink|スクナビコナ|Q3275687|少名彦命}}、{{jalink|玉櫛媛|Q11572681|玉櫛姫命}}、{{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山祇命}} === 摂末社 === * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 === 祭事 === * 夏季大祭 - {{jalink|7月9日|Q2690}} * 秋季大祭 - {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} === 交通 === * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|牟岐線|Q860478}}「{{jalink|地蔵橋駅|Q6203576}}」より徒歩で約15分。 * {{jalink|徳島自動車道|Q11490216}}「{{jalink|徳島インターチェンジ|Q11071632}}」より車で約20分。 === 脚注 === {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{jalink|式内社}} |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=勝占神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''勝占神社'''（かつらじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}{{jalink|勝占町|Q11400186}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 歴史 === 創祀年代は不詳『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603）。{{jalink|1875年|Q7764}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}8年）までは杉尾大明神と呼ばれ、{{jalink|スサノオ|Q272993|素盞嗚尊}}が祭神であったという説がある。 {{jalink|元暦|Q1194250}}元年（{{jalink|1184年|Q19728}}）{{jalink|3月10日 (旧暦)|Q839021|3月10日}}に{{jalink|源義経|Q310445}}が{{jalink|屋島|Q11465681}}へ向かう途中に参拝したと伝わる{{jalink|2000年|Q1985}},{{jalink|平凡社|Q11482108}}『徳島県の地名』。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|大国主|Q276944|大己貴命}} * 配祀 - {{jalink|事代主|Q8009611|事代主命}}、{{jalink|スセリビメ|Q8191715|須勢理姫命}}、{{jalink|スクナビコナ|Q3275687|少名彦命}}、{{jalink|玉櫛媛|Q11572681|玉櫛姫命}}、{{jalink|オオヤマツミ|Q386563|大山祇命}} === 摂末社 === * 金比羅宮、袋振宮、秋葉神社、地神社 === 祭事 === * 夏季大祭 - {{jalink|7月9日|Q2690}} * 秋季大祭 - {{jalink|10月9日|Q2923}} === 交通 === * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|牟岐線|Q860478}}「{{jalink|地蔵橋駅|Q6203576}}」より徒歩で約15分。 * {{jalink|徳島自動車道|Q11490216}}「{{jalink|徳島インターチェンジ|Q11071632}}」より車で約20分。 === 脚注 === {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Worship hall |所在地= {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}{{jalink|Tokushima|Q207309}}{{jalink|Katsura-chō|Q11400186}} Nakayama 26 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|Ōkuninushi|Q276944|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto}} |社格= former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}
{{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{jalink|October 9|Q2923}} |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Katsura Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Katsura Shrine''' (かつらじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Katsura-chō|Q11400186}}, {{jalink|Tokushima|Q207309}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}. === History === Its founding period is unknown''{{jalink|Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{jalink|1986|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603). Up to {{jalink|1875|Q7764}} (Meiji 8), it was called Sugiō Daimyōjin, and there is a theory that {{jalink|Susanoo|Q272993|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} was its deity. It is said that on the lunar date of March 10 in {{jalink|1184|Q19728}} (Genryaku 1), {{jalink|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Q310445}} worshipped here while heading for {{jalink|Yashima|Q11465681}}{{jalink|2000|Q1985}}, {{jalink|Heibonsha|Q11482108}}, ''Place Names of Tokushima Prefecture''. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Ōkuninushi|Q276944|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto}} * Associated deities - {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Suseribime|Q8191715|Suserihime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Sukunabikona|Q3275687|Sukunabikona-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Tamakushihime|Q11572681|Tamakushihime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}} === Sessha and Massha === * Konpira-gū, Fukeburi-gū, Akiba Shrine, Jisha Shrine === Festivals === * Summer grand festival - {{jalink|July 9|Q2690}} * Autumn grand festival - {{jalink|October 9|Q2923}} === Access === * About 15 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Jizōbashi Station|Q6203576}} on the {{jalink|Mugi Line|Q860478}} of {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}. * About 20 minutes by car from {{jalink|Tokushima Interchange|Q11071632}} on the {{jalink|Tokushima Expressway|Q11490216}}. === Notes === {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Up to {{jalink|1875|Q7764}} (Meiji 8), it was called Sugiō Daimyōjin, and there is a theory that {{jalink|Susanoo|Q272993|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} was its deity. It is said that on the lunar date of March 10 in {{jalink|1184|Q19728}} (Genryaku 1), {{jalink|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Q310445}} worshipped here while heading for {{jalink|Yashima|Q11465681}}{{jalink|2000|Q1985}}, {{jalink|Heibonsha|Q11482108}}, ''Place Names of Tokushima Prefecture''. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Ōkuninushi|Q276944|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto}} * Associated deities - {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Suseribime|Q8191715|Suserihime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Sukunabikona|Q3275687|Sukunabikona-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Tamakushihime|Q11572681|Tamakushihime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}} === Sessha and Massha === * Konpira-gū, Fukeburi-gū, Akiba Shrine, Jisha Shrine === Festivals === * Summer grand festival - {{jalink|July 9|Q2690}} * Autumn grand festival - {{jalink|October 9|Q2923}} === Access === * About 15 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Jizōbashi Station|Q6203576}} on the {{jalink|Mugi Line|Q860478}} of {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}. * About 20 minutes by car from {{jalink|Tokushima Interchange|Q11071632}} on the {{jalink|Tokushima Expressway|Q11490216}}. === Notes === {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Up to {{jalink|1875|Q7764}} (Meiji 8), it was called Sugiō Daimyōjin, and there is a theory that {{jalink|Susanoo|Q272993|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} was its deity. It is said that on the lunar date of March 10 in {{jalink|1184|Q19728}} (Genryaku 1), {{jalink|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Q310445}} worshipped here while heading for {{jalink|Yashima|Q11465681}}{{jalink|2000|Q1985}}, {{jalink|Heibonsha|Q11482108}}, ''Place Names of Tokushima Prefecture''. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Ōkuninushi|Q276944|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto}} * Associated deities - {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Suseribime|Q8191715|Suserihime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Sukunabikona|Q3275687|Sukunabikona-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Tamakushihime|Q11572681|Tamakushihime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}} === Sessha and Massha === * Konpira-gū, Fukeburi-gū, Akiba Shrine, Jisha Shrine === Festivals === * Summer grand festival - {{jalink|July 9|Q2690}} * Autumn grand festival - {{jalink|October 9|Q2923}} === Access === * About 15 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Jizōbashi Station|Q6203576}} on the {{jalink|Mugi Line|Q860478}} of {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}. * About 20 minutes by car from {{jalink|Tokushima Interchange|Q11071632}} on the {{jalink|Tokushima Expressway|Q11490216}}. === Notes === {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: used local AI agents to translate these pages. Contrary to the description it was actually Claude Code for a few, OpenClaw with Codex, and regular Codex. Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

{{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{jalink|October 9|Q2923}} |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Katsura Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Katsura Shrine''' (かつらじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Katsura-chō|Q11400186}}, {{jalink|Tokushima|Q207309}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}. === History === Its founding period is unknown''{{jalink|Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{jalink|1986|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603). Up to {{jalink|1875|Q7764}} (Meiji 8), it was called Sugiō Daimyōjin, and there is a theory that {{jalink|Susanoo|Q272993|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} was its deity. It is said that on the lunar date of March 10 in {{jalink|1184|Q19728}} (Genryaku 1), {{jalink|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Q310445}} worshipped here while heading for {{jalink|Yashima|Q11465681}}{{jalink|2000|Q1985}}, {{jalink|Heibonsha|Q11482108}}, ''Place Names of Tokushima Prefecture''. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Ōkuninushi|Q276944|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto}} * Associated deities - {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Suseribime|Q8191715|Suserihime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Sukunabikona|Q3275687|Sukunabikona-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Tamakushihime|Q11572681|Tamakushihime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}} === Sessha and Massha === * Konpira-gū, Fukeburi-gū, Akiba Shrine, Jisha Shrine === Festivals === * Summer grand festival - {{jalink|July 9|Q2690}} * Autumn grand festival - {{jalink|October 9|Q2923}} === Access === * About 15 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Jizōbashi Station|Q6203576}} on the {{jalink|Mugi Line|Q860478}} of {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}. * About 20 minutes by car from {{jalink|Tokushima Interchange|Q11071632}} on the {{jalink|Tokushima Expressway|Q11490216}}. === Notes === {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Up to {{jalink|1875|Q7764}} (Meiji 8), it was called Sugiō Daimyōjin, and there is a theory that {{jalink|Susanoo|Q272993|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} was its deity. It is said that on the lunar date of March 10 in {{jalink|1184|Q19728}} (Genryaku 1), {{jalink|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Q310445}} worshipped here while heading for {{jalink|Yashima|Q11465681}}{{jalink|2000|Q1985}}, {{jalink|Heibonsha|Q11482108}}, ''Place Names of Tokushima Prefecture''. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Ōkuninushi|Q276944|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto}} * Associated deities - {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Suseribime|Q8191715|Suserihime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Sukunabikona|Q3275687|Sukunabikona-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Tamakushihime|Q11572681|Tamakushihime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}} === Sessha and Massha === * Konpira-gū, Fukeburi-gū, Akiba Shrine, Jisha Shrine === Festivals === * Summer grand festival - {{jalink|July 9|Q2690}} * Autumn grand festival - {{jalink|October 9|Q2923}} === Access === * About 15 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Jizōbashi Station|Q6203576}} on the {{jalink|Mugi Line|Q860478}} of {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}. * About 20 minutes by car from {{jalink|Tokushima Interchange|Q11071632}} on the {{jalink|Tokushima Expressway|Q11490216}}. === Notes === {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建= |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{jalink|October 9|Q2923}} |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Katsura Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Katsura Shrine''' (かつらじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Katsura-chō|Q11400186}}, {{jalink|Tokushima|Q207309}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}. === History === Its founding period is unknown''{{jalink|Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{jalink|1986|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603). Up to {{jalink|1875|Q7764}} (Meiji 8), it was called Sugiō Daimyōjin, and there is a theory that {{jalink|Susanoo|Q272993|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} was its deity. It is said that on the lunar date of March 10 in {{jalink|1184|Q19728}} (Genryaku 1), {{jalink|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Q310445}} worshipped here while heading for {{jalink|Yashima|Q11465681}}{{jalink|2000|Q1985}}, {{jalink|Heibonsha|Q11482108}}, ''Place Names of Tokushima Prefecture''. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Ōkuninushi|Q276944|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto}} * Associated deities - {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Suseribime|Q8191715|Suserihime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Sukunabikona|Q3275687|Sukunabikona-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Tamakushihime|Q11572681|Tamakushihime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi|Q386563|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}} === Sessha and Massha === * Konpira-gū, Fukeburi-gū, Akiba Shrine, Jisha Shrine === Festivals === * Summer grand festival - {{jalink|July 9|Q2690}} * Autumn grand festival - {{jalink|October 9|Q2923}} === Access === * About 15 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Jizōbashi Station|Q6203576}} on the {{jalink|Mugi Line|Q860478}} of {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}. * About 20 minutes by car from {{jalink|Tokushima Interchange|Q11071632}} on the {{jalink|Tokushima Expressway|Q11490216}}. === Notes === {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かつらしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Katsura Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]
